data.title: A whale withdrew 12,100 AAVE from Binance 9 hours ago and currently holds a total of 39,300 AAVE
data.description: According to The Data Nerd, a whale withdrew 12,100 AAVE from Binance nine hours ago, worth approximately $2.71 million. Currently, the whale holds a total of 39,300 AAVE, worth approximately $8.92 million, with a floating loss of approximately $2.05 million.

data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC has broken through 111,000 USDT and is currently trading at 111,006.9 USDT, a 24-hour increase of 2.24%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Gate launches Orochi Network (ON)
data.description: According to an official announcement, Gate will launch live trading of Orochi Network (ON) perpetual contracts (settled in USDT) at 16:30 (UTC+8) on October 24th, supporting 1-20x leverage. The Gate Perp DEX will also be launched simultaneously. ON margin lending trading will open at 18:10 (UTC+8) on October 24th. ON trading bots and copy trading will be available within one hour of the perpetual contract launch. ON flash swap and fixed investment features will be available one hour after spot trading begins.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $20.3254 million yesterday, with BlackRock IBIT leading the way with a net inflow of $108 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $20.3254 million yesterday (October 23rd, US Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest daily net inflow yesterday was Blackrock's IBIT ETF, with a net inflow of $108 million, bringing IBIT's total net inflow to $65.273 billion. The second largest daily net inflow was Bitwise ETF BITB, with a net inflow of $17.4081 million, bringing BITB's total net inflow to $2.394 billion. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest daily net outflow yesterday was Grayscale's GBTC ETF, with a net outflow of $60.4850 million, bringing GBTC's total net outflow to $24.616 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF was US$149.431 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value as a percentage of the total market value of Bitcoin) reached 6.84%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$61.894 billion.

data.title: Only 274 addresses successfully participated in the Stable pre-deposit activity
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, only 274 addresses successfully participated in the $825 million pre-deposit campaign for the public stablecoin Stable. A single whale/institution secured $500 million through nine addresses, representing a 60.6% share.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $128 million yesterday, while none of the nine ETFs saw a net inflow.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $128 million yesterday (October 23rd, US Eastern Time). The Fidelity ETF (FETH) saw the largest daily net outflow, with a net outflow of $77.0438 million. FETH's total net inflow has now reached $2.690 billion. The second largest daily net outflow was the Blackrock ETF (ETHA), with a net outflow of $23.3506 million. ETHA's total net inflow has now reached $14.255 billion. As of press time, the Ethereum spot ETF's total net asset value (NAV) was $26.023 billion, with a 5.63% ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization). The cumulative net inflow has reached $14.447 billion.

data.title: Basechain X402 protocol meme coin PING's market capitalization surpasses $20 million, up over 521% in a single day.
data.description: According to GMGN market data, the market capitalization of PING, the Base Chain's X402 protocol meme coin, briefly exceeded $20 million and is now trading at $17.19 million, a daily increase of over 521%. Odaily reminds users that meme coins are subject to significant price fluctuations, so investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: The probability of "CZ returning to Binance before December 31st" on Polymarket has risen to 30%.
data.description: According to official data on Polymarket, the probability of betting on CZ returning to Binance before December 31st has continued to rise since yesterday, currently at 30%. This follows news that Trump announced a pardon for CZ.

data.title: Chinese Commerce Minister: The first four rounds of economic and trade consultations have fully demonstrated that China and the United States can find ways to resolve each other's concerns
data.description: The Central Committee of the Communist Party of China held a press conference this morning (the 24th) to introduce and interpret the spirit of the Fourth Plenary Session of the 20th Central Committee of the Party. Wang Wentao, Secretary of the Party Leadership Group and Minister of Commerce, stated at the press conference that China, as a responsible major country, has consistently opposed "decoupling" and firmly safeguarded the security and stability of the global supply chain. The first four rounds of Sino-US economic and trade consultations have fully demonstrated that, based on mutual respect and equal consultation, China and the United States can fully find solutions to address each other's concerns, find a proper way to coexist, and promote the healthy, stable, and sustainable development of Sino-US economic and trade relations. (CCTV News)

data.description: On Oct 24, 2025, 04:34 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 1,140 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,142.22998 USDT, with a narrowed 5.18% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Gate Meme Go launches a limited-time free transaction fee event
data.description: According to official news, Meme Go, Gate Web3's full-chain Meme coin trading and monitoring platform, is becoming a vital tool for Web3 users to analyze on-chain assets and make trading decisions thanks to its professional features. Meme Go's limited-time, site-wide transaction fee-free promotion is currently underway, allowing users to experience full-chain trading at zero cost and make efficient decisions more quickly and reliably. Meme Go also supports millisecond-level real-time monitoring of token launch platforms across the entire chain, helping users quickly lock in promising tokens and seize early dividends. Its innovative features are leading on-chain trading to new heights, significantly improving the speed and accuracy of on-chain investment decisions. Furthermore, Meme Go's professional trading dashboard integrates multiple core features, including customizable candlestick charts and a deeply modular design, offering users a brand new trading experience. The former is deeply customized for on-chain trading characteristics, supporting multi-dimensional data display and real-time price linkage, helping users quickly understand market trends. The latter supports flexible drag-and-drop layout of monitoring and order modules, enabling seamless integration of market monitoring and order placement. With its intelligent interface and efficient interactive experience, Meme Go is continuously improving users' analysis depth and execution efficiency in on-chain transactions, further promoting the visualization and professionalization of Web3 transaction data.

data.title: Stablecoin Blockchain Deposit Activity Sees Limited Participation
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a recent monitoring of the stablecoin blockchain deposit activity revealed that only 274 addresses successfully participated in the $825 million allocation. A significant portion of this, amounting to $500 million or 60.6%, was controlled by a single whale or institution using nine addresses.

data.title: Fidelity Adds Solana (SOL) to Its Platform, Bridging Wall Street and Web3
data.description:
Fidelity has added Solana trading to its retail, IRA, and institutional platforms, marking another step toward bridging traditional finance and blockchain.

The post Fidelity Adds Solana (SOL) to Its Platform, Bridging Wall Street and Web3 first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/10/24/fidelity-adds-solana-to-platform/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=fidelity-adds-solana-to-platform
